title: ctxlint configuration
description: Configuration for ctxlint (ctxlint.config.json). Every option has a default; only set what you need to change.

surfaceWarnTokens.description: Warn when a single context file exceeds this many estimated tokens.

effectiveContextWarnTokens.description: Warn when one tool's effective context exceeds this many estimated tokens.

buriedRuleDepthRatio.description: Rules deeper than this fraction of an oversized file are flagged as likely lost in long sessions.

maxFiles.description: Hard cap on files walked during discovery (also settable via --max-files).

maxSurfaceBytes.description: Context files larger than this are skipped with a warn finding.

maxRules.description: Pairwise analyzers bail gracefully above this rule count.

model.description: Judge model id used by `ctxlint compliance`.

calibrationModel.description: Second model used by --calibrate for agreement checks.

commits.description: Number of recent merged changes to sample.

spendCapUsd.description: Require --yes when the estimated API spend exceeds this (USD).

agreementWarnThreshold.description: Below this agreement, per-rule scores are reported as directional only.
